speaker: David Kessler
episode_or_content_title: David Kessler: How to find meaning after loss | TED
verification_notes: Verified 2026-06-06 against English captions via yt-dlp on TED's official YouTube channel (channel_id UCAuUUnT6oDeKwE6v1NGQxug). Excerpt confirmed verbatim at 1:43–2:02. Clip deliberately starts at 'And when we talk about meaning' — after Kessler's personal reference to his son's death (around 1:25) — to keep the SIO non-crisis and on the meaning-is-made point. Kessler explicitly extends the loss to 'a job being lost' / 'a dream died', so the moment generalizes beyond bereavement to direction-collapse. Embed via youtube-nocookie.
rights_or_usage_notes: Official channel video. Brief verbatim quote for attribution; embed/link only.
